description: AI Receptionist Configuration for a business: controls how the AI receptionist behaves across all channels (web widget, WhatsApp, etc.). Includes FAQ/guidance, lead capture settings, business hours, knowledge inclusion flags, and proactive action offers. Returned inside `data` (wrapped by standard Response) for authenticated CRUD/main APIs.

owner_id.description: Staff UID of the last editor.

config.description: The AI chat configuration blob. Sparse — omitted keys use product defaults.

faq_and_guidance.description: Free-text FAQ and guidance instructions for the AI receptionist.

business_hours.description: Business hours text; null uses calendar-derived defaults.

lead_intent_data.description: Intent-based lead capture configuration. Each item defines one intent and the data to collect.

lead_data_items.description: Comma-separated or free-text list of lead fields to collect for this intent (e.g., "Full name, email, phone").

lead_message_to_visitor.description: Guidance text for how the AI chat receptionist should explain what is being collected and what happens next while capturing lead details.

lead_capture_text.description: Default lead-capture message shown to clients during lead collection.

include_contact_info.description: Whether to include business contact info in AI guidance context.

include_services.description: Whether to include business services in AI guidance context.

include_products.description: Whether to include business products in AI guidance context.

include_booking_policies.description: Whether to include booking policies in AI guidance context.

include_terms_of_service.description: Whether to include terms of service in AI guidance context.

guidance_urls.description: Extra URLs whose content is merged into AI guidance.

ai_actions.description: AI proactive action behavior. Defines which actions the AI should proactively offer and when.

should_offer.description: Whether the AI should proactively suggest this action.

when_to_offer.description: Guidance text for when the AI should suggest this action (e.g., "Offer when client asks about scheduling").

config.faq_and_guidance: Answer questions about pricing, emergency calls, and availability.

lead_intent_data.lead_message_to_visitor: Please share your contact details and we will follow up shortly.

config.lead_capture_text: Share your details and we will get back to you shortly.

ai_actions.when_to_offer: Offer when client asks about scheduling or availability.
